calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Arnold Walter Evje. Defendant Anita Charles appearing in Pro Per.No appearance by co-defendant, Sidney Thomas who has default entered against him. The parties enter into a stipulation regarding both the defendants per the record. The Court orders the trial date vacated.
